mapper.sql: sub_task_id, task_id, note_id, author_id, published_at, target_user_ids_json, progress_user_id, sub_task_status, message_status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task WHERE message_status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT FROM bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY sub_task_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task SET message_status = 'SENT', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE sub_task_id = #{subTaskId}

UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task SET message_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE sub_task_id = #{subTaskId}
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task SET sub_task_status = 'RUNNING', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE sub_task_id = #{subTaskId} AND sub_task_status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED')
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task SET progress_user_id = #{progressUserId}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE sub_task_id = #{subTaskId}
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task SET sub_task_status = 'SUCCESS', last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE sub_task_id = #{subTaskId}
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_sub_task SET sub_task_status = 'FAILED', last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE sub_task_id = #{subTaskId}
